name: Underwater Treasures Polyped Coral Fish Ornament
description: This Underwater Treasures Polyped Coral Fish Ornament is part of Underwater Treasures' breathtaking line of coral replicas. These captivating, realistic decorations are handcrafted and painted using only the highest quality materials. And since they are partly constructed using flexible materials, they move underwater just like real corals! Not only will they complement your custom aquatic aquarium, but you’ll be happy to know that all Underwater Treasures coral replicas are non-toxic and safe for both freshwater and saltwater aquariums. You’ll love this aquarium ornament and so will your scaly sidekicks!
